slides.title: Text Widget 📝
slides.content:
# Text

Displays a string of text with a single style.

* Can set `style` with `TextStyle`.
* Supports overflow handling, max lines, etc.

quizData.question: Which widget would you use to add background color and padding around another widget?
quizData.explanation: Container can have color, padding, margin, and decoration.

slides.title: Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content:
## Use `Image.asset` for local images

Add images to your `pubspec.yaml` under `assets` and load with `Image.asset('path/to/image.png')`.
